# MOOV

> MOOV is a venture capital fund focused on mobility startups in Latin America.
> We invest from Pre-seed to Series A across all mobility verticals.
> Backed by Grupo Huerpel's operating network in Mexico and Colombia.

## About MOOV
- Fund focus: Mobility startups (ride-hailing, fleet, EV, logistics, transit tech, auto fintech, micromobility, parking)
- Geographic focus: Latin America — primarily Mexico and Colombia
- Investment stages: Pre-seed, Seed, Series A
- Backed by: Grupo Huerpel
- Value proposition: Capital + operators, distribution channels, and corporate customers from day one
- Response time: We read every application and respond within 2 weeks

## Apply for Investment
- URL: https://apply.moov.vc
- Application time: ~5 minutes
- Response time: Within 14 days
- Instruments: Convertible Note, SAFE, Equity, Warrants, Debt
- Next step after review: Intro call with the investment team

## Investment Verticals
- Ride-hailing & ridesharing
- Micromobility (scooters, bikes)
- Fleet management
- Logistics & last-mile delivery
- Electric vehicles & clean energy mobility
- Public transit technology
- Parking & infrastructure
- Auto fintech

## Contact
- Website: https://moov.vc
- Apply: https://apply.moov.vc
- Email: deals@moov.vc
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/moovvc
